operating_ranges.evidence: Maintains net pressure between programmable limits - Automatically loads and unloads compressor - Programmable settings include: Unloading pressures
Maintains net pressure between programmable limits - Automatically loads and unloads compressor - Programmable settings include: Loading pressures
Programmable settings include: Maximum number of motor starts
Idling period limitation: Limited by timer (set example: 20 minutes)
Power Recovery Time Settings: Range: 1 to 254 seconds

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Service Warning: Continuously monitors: Oil, Oil filters, Oil separator, Air filter - Each input compared to programmed limits (temperatures, pressures, running hours)

fault_conditions.name: compressor_element_overtemperature
fault_conditions.description: Compressor element outlet temperature exceeds programmed shut-down level
fault_conditions.evidence: Shut-down Conditions: Compressor element outlet temperature exceeds programmed shut-down level - Display indication: (4-Fig. 1.9)

fault_conditions.name: temperature_warning
fault_conditions.description: Compressor element outlet temperature exceeds programmed warning level
fault_conditions.symptoms: Warning message before shut-down level reached
fault_conditions.evidence: Shut-down Warning: Triggered when compressor element outlet temperature exceeds programmed value below shut-down level

fault_conditions.name: service_warning
fault_conditions.description: Service limits exceeded for monitored components
fault_conditions.evidence: Service Warning: Message appears on display (4-Fig. 1.9) when limits exceeded

fault_conditions.name: sensor_fault
fault_conditions.evidence: General alarm LED: Is alight if a warning or shut-down warning condition exists or if a sensor is out of order

maintenance_actions.name: service_warning_reset
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: Service warning messages for oil, filters, separator, and air filter
maintenance_actions.evidence: Service Warning: Continuously monitors: Oil, Oil filters, Oil separator, Air filter - Each input compared to programmed limits

maintenance_actions.name: automatic_restart_configuration
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: Automatic restart function after voltage failure
maintenance_actions.evidence: Factory Default: Function INACTIVE for compressors leaving factory - Activation: Function can be activated if desired (Consult Atlas Copco)

assumptions.statement: The elektronikon regulator operates as a complete electronic control system with both hardware and software components
assumptions.reason: Manual describes it as 'Electronic regulator + control panel' with programmable functions and display capabilities

assumptions.statement: Pressure control operates in discrete load/unload states rather than continuous modulation
assumptions.reason: Manual describes 'Automatically loads and unloads compressor' and references load/unload regulation principles
